claim_boundary: Internal sampled synthetic campaign only; not operational POD; not external validation; no learned model training or checkpoint inference.
diagnostic_definition: For each visible station update, compute z - h(x_pre) inside the UKF/AUKF recursion immediately before that station's update, wrap the azimuth residual, whiten by the nominal measurement-noise standard deviations only, and sum squared components. This excludes post-update filtered histories and excludes the predicted-state covariance term in S.

row_checkpointing.flush_policy: append, flush, and fsync after each completed realization

sampling_frame.frame_type: named synthetic scenario cells from configs/experiment.yaml
sampling_frame.controlled_scalar_perturbations: not used in this focused implementation
